summary: Phase 31A Patrol AI ↔ City Heatmap Integration fully tested. Backend: 17/17 tests passed verifying /api/operator/patrol/generate with and without use_heatmap parameter. WITHOUT heatmap: heatmap_enhanced=false, heatmap_stats=null, score_breakdown has heatmap_score=0/heatmap_risk=none/heatmap_boost=1.0. WITH heatmap: heatmap_enhanced=true, heatmap_stats present, score_breakdown includes non-zero heatmap values, correct boost multipliers (critical=1.25, high=1.12, moderate=1.0, safe=0.9), base_composite_score field present, heatmap_cell_id when matched. Frontend: All heatmap integration features verified - toggle switch (patrol-heatmap-toggle), heatmap badges (+25%/+12%) on zone cards, expanded zone shows Heatmap score bar (amber) with cell ID and boost multiplier, map overlay shows 'Heatmap' label with flame icon, heat layer renders on map.
critical_code_review_comments: Heatmap boost constants correctly defined: HEATMAP_BOOST_CRITICAL=1.25, HEATMAP_BOOST_HIGH=1.12, HEATMAP_BOOST_MODERATE=1.0, HEATMAP_BOOST_SAFE=0.9
_get_heatmap_boost() correctly matches zones to nearest heatmap cell within ~500m (0.005 degree Manhattan distance)
Boosted composite_score = min(10.0, base_composite_score * heatmap_boost) - properly capped at 10.0
base_composite_score preserved in response for comparison when heatmap enabled
score_breakdown includes heatmap_score, heatmap_risk, heatmap_boost, heatmap_cell_id (when matched)
Frontend PatrolHeatLayer correctly renders heat layer using leaflet.heat with gradient from safe (green) to critical (dark red)
Zone cards show amber heatmap badges with boost percentage (+25% for critical, +12% for high)
Expanded zone card shows Heatmap score bar with cell ID and boost multiplier
seed_data_creation: Used existing location_risk_zones (learned_hotspots) and location_incidents data from city heatmap engine
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 31A integrates Patrol AI with City Heatmap. Key endpoint: GET /api/operator/patrol/generate?use_heatmap=true. Heatmap boost multipliers: critical=1.25, high=1.12, moderate=1.0, safe=0.9. Frontend data-testid values: patrol-ai-dashboard, patrol-controls, patrol-heatmap-toggle, patrol-generate-btn, patrol-zone-{N}, heatmap-badge-{N}. Route generation with heatmap takes ~10-15 seconds (generates heatmap + patrol route). Test file: test_patrol_heatmap_integration.py

backend_api_tests: WITHOUT heatmap: score_breakdown has heatmap_score=0, heatmap_risk=none, heatmap_boost=1.0
WITH heatmap: heatmap_stats present with critical/high/moderate/safe counts
WITH heatmap: score_breakdown has heatmap_score, heatmap_risk, heatmap_boost fields
WITH heatmap: each zone has base_composite_score field
WITH heatmap: heatmap_cell_id present when zone matched to cell
WITH heatmap: each zone has heatmap_enhanced=true
Boost multipliers match expected values (critical=1.25, high=1.12, moderate=1.0, safe=0.9)
Patrol generate requires authentication (401 without token)
Patrol generate with heatmap requires authentication (401 without token)
frontend_ui_tests: Patrol AI nav link visible in sidebar
Patrol controls panel present with data-testid=patrol-controls
Heatmap toggle switch present with data-testid=patrol-heatmap-toggle
Route WITHOUT heatmap: 10 zone cards generated, 0 heatmap badges
Route WITH heatmap: toggle state=checked after click
Route WITH heatmap: 10 zone cards with heatmap badges (+12%, +25%)
Route WITH heatmap: Map overlay shows 'Heatmap' label with flame icon
Expanded zone card shows all 5 score bars + Heatmap score bar (amber)
Expanded zone shows Cell ID (e.g., C098_031) and Boost (e.g., x1.12)
Heat layer canvas element rendered on map

verified_features: Heatmap boost changes composite scores: critical zones boosted 25%, high zones boosted 12%
Response includes base_composite_score field when heatmap is used for comparison
Score breakdown includes heatmap_score, heatmap_risk, heatmap_boost, heatmap_cell_id
Frontend heatmap toggle switch (patrol-heatmap-toggle) in controls panel
Frontend heatmap badges (+25%/+12%) on zone cards when heatmap enabled
Expanded zone card shows Heatmap score bar (amber) with cell ID and boost multiplier
Map overlay shows 'Heatmap' label with flame icon when heatmap-enhanced
Heat layer overlay appears on patrol route map when heatmap toggle is ON
Without heatmap toggle, route works as before (no heatmap bars or badges)
